query:
SELECT b.title, a.name as author_name, LENGTH(b.title) as title_len, LENGTH(a.name) as author_len
FROM books b
LEFT JOIN authors a ON b.authorId = a.id
ORDER BY LENGTH(b.title) DESC
LIMIT 100;
